title: ilex harrisii
intro: Ilex harrisii, also known as the Harris Holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. It is native to the southeastern United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves and berries have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Ilex harrisii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
